title: Edge Security, WAF, Hotlinking, Headers, and Failure Containment · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible layered edge-security and abuse-control plan with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered edge-security and abuse-control plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal deb…
objectives: Apply WAF, rate limits, bot controls, request size and method rules with false-positive, cost, accessibility, and bypass evidence.
Treat Referer hotlink controls as a weak cost signal and use signed access or a controlled origin header only within its actual threat boundary.
Set HSTS, MIME sniffing, frame, referrer, content security, cross-origin, and content-disposition headers appropriate to file types and embedding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Waf Rate Bot Boundary
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 5910 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to layer application authorization, WAF, origin protection, headers, and safe error caching; cap bytes, time, attempts, concurrency, and spend before starting work; then cancel halfway through and prove every body, part, and goroutine reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply WAF, rate limits, bot controls, request size and method rules with false-positive, cost, accessibility, and bypass evidence.

Inspect the Waf Rate Bot Boundary trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Waf Rate Bot Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply waf, rate limits, bot controls, request size and method rules with false-positive, cost, accessibility, and bypass evidence. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Waf Rate Bot Boundary, keep Waf Rate Bot Boundary connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.
